title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of April 28, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Live AI Use Cases Show How SAP Delivers Trusted Orchestration and Smarter Execution for Manufacturing and Supply Chain M, The New SAP AppHaus Walldorf Opens Its Doors for Customers, From Track to Tech and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Live AI Use Cases Show How SAP Delivers Trusted Orchestration and Smarter Execution for Manufacturing and Supply Chain M
summary: SAP showcased AI-powered innovations for manufacturing and supply chain management at Hannover Messe 2026. This demonstration highlights SAP's capabilities in trusted orchestration and smarter execution.

title: The New SAP AppHaus Walldorf Opens Its Doors for Customers
summary: SAP opens AppHaus Walldorf to customers, offering integrated experience. This marks a significant milestone in SAP's customer experience strategy.

title: From Track to Tech: David Coulthard at SAP Sapphire 2026 in Orlando and Madrid
summary: Formula One legend David Coulthard shares insights on business transformation at SAP Sapphire 2026. He draws parallels between racing and tech to inspire innovation in the corporate world.

title: How NEC Is Becoming an AI-Native Enterprise with SAP
summary:
NEC partners with SAP to integrate AI across its operations, leveraging SAP's AI capabilities. This strategic partnership enables NEC to drive AI adoption and innovation.

Why it matters: NEC's AI-native transformation may set a precedent for other enterprises to follow, demonstrating the potential for AI-driven business growth and competitiveness.

title: From Policy Debate to Practice: BSI Vice President Thomas Caspers on C3A, Cloud Sovereignty, and SAP
summary: BSI Vice President Thomas Caspers is driving the practical implementation of C3A, a cloud security standard. This marks a shift from policy debate to actual practice in digital sovereignty.

title: Where Do You Stand? Business Transformation Maturity Assessment Tool Now Available
summary: A new Business Transformation Maturity Assessment Tool is now available to help organizations evaluate their transformation capabilities. This tool will identify areas for improvement, enabling companies to adapt and thrive in a rapidly changing market.

title: Software Is Entering Its Most Powerful Era
summary: Enterprise software is experiencing a surge in importance due to its business-critical nature. This shift highlights the increasing reliance on software for companies, making it a vital component of their operations.

title: Information About Upcoming Merger of emarsys interactive services GmbH into SAP SE
summary:
SAP SE announces the merger of emarsys interactive services GmbH into SAP SE. The acquisition aims to expand SAP's customer experience and marketing capabilities.

Why it matters: This merger strengthens SAP's position in the marketing automation and customer experience space.

title: SAP Announces Q1 2026 Results
summary: SAP reports 25% growth in current cloud backlog and 27% increase in cloud revenue at constant currencies in Q1 2026. This matters as it indicates strong demand for SAP's cloud services and a positive start to the year.

title: The Real Risk to AI in HR Is Fragmentation
summary: Fragmentation in AI adoption in HR is a growing concern, leading to inconsistent decision-making processes. This matters because it undermines the effectiveness and reliability of AI-driven HR systems.

title: AI Is Raising the Bar for Customer Experience: SAP and Google Cloud Are Building What Comes Next
summary: SAP and Google Cloud are developing a multi-agent orchestration system. This technology connects AI agents to trusted enterprise data for enhanced customer experience.

title: SAP and Google Cloud Expand Partnership to Deploy Multi-Agent AI
summary: SAP and Google Cloud expand partnership to deploy multi-agent AI, enabling large-scale AI agent deployment for marketers. This partnership matters as it will help businesses scale AI capabilities more efficiently.

title: Using AI to Scale Social Impact
summary: AI is being leveraged to amplify social impact by scaling innovative solutions to pressing global issues. This matters because it can create sustainable, purpose-driven businesses that benefit both people and the planet.

title: The Engagement Divide: 15 Reasons It’s Time to Fix CX
summary:
Research highlights 15 key reasons why companies need to improve customer experience (CX). 

The engagement divide matters because it directly impacts customer loyalty and business growth.

title: SAP at Hannover Messe 2026: Operationalizing Agentic AI to Drive Resilient, End-to-End Manufacturing
summary: SAP is showcasing end-to-end supply chain orchestration with AI at Hannover Messe 2026. This matters as it can drive resilient manufacturing operations.

title: F1 World Champion Mika Häkkinen Joins SAP Sapphire 2026 in Orlando and Madrid
summary: F1 World Champion Mika Häkkinen is joining SAP Sapphire 2026 in Orlando and Madrid. This collaboration highlights the intersection of high-performance racing and data-driven technology.

title: Industry Under Pressure: How SAP and Uhlmann Are Strengthening Value Creation Resilience
summary: SAP and Uhlmann unveiled PacXplorer at HANNOVER MESSE 2026, a solution to strengthen value creation resilience. This matters as it helps companies adapt to industry pressures and maintain stability in uncertain markets.

title: AI in the Flow of Business Execution: What’s New in SAP Customer Experience Q1 2026
summary: SAP introduces AI-driven customer experience enhancements in Q1 2026, integrating AI into business execution. This integration enables real-time decision-making and automation.

title: SAP Cloud Infrastructure: Data Centers in Germany Achieve IT-Grundschutz Certification
summary: SAP Cloud Infrastructure data centers in Germany have achieved IT-Grundschutz certification. This certification strengthens SAP's Sovereign Cloud portfolio in a highly security-conscious market.

title: SAP to Announce Results for First Quarter of 2026
summary: SAP will announce its Q1 2026 financial results on April 23. This marks the company's quarterly earnings release.

title: How Real NHL® Game Data Is Helping Students Build Analytical Skills for the Future
summary: Students can now learn analytical skills using real NHL game data through a new Business Builders game. This matters because it provides hands-on experience with real-world data, preparing students for future careers in data analysis.

title: From Readiness to Resilience: Honoring the 2026 SAP Innovation Award Winners
summary: SAP has announced 19 winners of its 2026 Innovation Awards, showcasing resilience through digital sovereignty, AI, and cloud-based transformations. This matters as it highlights companies successfully adapting to a rapidly changing business landscape.

title: SAP Business AI: Release Highlights Q1 2026
summary: SAP releases Q1 2026 updates for Business AI, enhancing customer value from AI. This matters as it helps businesses leverage AI more effectively.

title: SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2026 Release: Strengthening Connection Across HR and the Business
summary:
SAP SuccessFactors releases 1H 2026 update to integrate HR and business functions. 
This matters as continuous AI in HR delivers the greatest impact across the workforce lifecycle.

title: SAP Extends Contract with Chief People Officer Gina Vargiu-Breuer
summary: SAP extends Chief People Officer Gina Vargiu-Breuer's contract to January 31, 2030. This extension matters as it indicates continued confidence in Vargiu-Breuer's leadership and strategic direction for SAP's human resources.

title: AI Is Causing Entry Level Roles to Evolve, Not Vanish—and CHROs Say the Stakes Are Rising
summary: New research from SAP and Wakefield shows AI is transforming entry-level roles, not eliminating them. This shift raises stakes for CHROs as they adapt to AI-driven changes in the employee lifecycle.

title: The Top Innovators of 2026: Announcing the SAP Innovation Award Finalists
summary: SAP announces finalists for its 2026 Innovation Award, recognizing companies that leverage SAP technology to adapt to change. This matters as it highlights the importance of tech-driven innovation in navigating complexity.

title: SAP Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Transportation Management Systems
summary: SAP has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Transportation Management Systems. This recognition highlights SAP's ability to support resilient, intelligent, and sustainable transportation operations.

title: Showcasing AI Innovation: Hasso Plattner Founders’ Award 2025 Winners Announced
summary: Two teams have been awarded the Hasso Plattner Founders' Award 2025 for AI innovation. The winners were chosen from 254 submissions, highlighting the growing field of AI advancements.

title: AI Road Map: How Accenture Uses AI as a Growth Engine
summary: Accenture's finance team now uses AI to generate narrative summaries for reporting, saving 57,000 hours annually. This efficiency gain matters as it showcases AI's potential to drive significant productivity improvements in business operations.

title: How Swiss Robotics Company ANYbotics and SAP Are Turning Dirty, Dusty, and Dangerous Industrial Inspections into Busines
summary: ANYbotics and SAP are integrating robotics and enterprise software for industrial inspections. This collaboration combines robotic exploration with data analysis for actionable insights.

title: A Cocktail of Intelligent Solutions From SAP Goes Live at Campari Group
summary: SAP's intelligent solutions go live at Campari Group, establishing an end-to-end digital architecture. This implementation enables the spirits industry leader to streamline operations and enhance decision-making capabilities.

title: SAP to Acquire Reltio: Make SAP and Non-SAP Data AI-Ready
summary: SAP is acquiring Reltio to make data from both SAP and non-SAP systems AI-ready. This acquisition aims to provide open and interoperable data across heterogeneous IT landscapes.

title: SAP and UnternehmerTUM Drive Co-Innovation in Embodied AI
summary: SAP and UnternehmerTUM collaborate on embodied AI co-innovation projects. Students, researchers, and SAP teams work together to apply scientific approaches to real-life challenges.

title: Team Liquid Turns to Joule to Unlock the Power of Esports Data
summary: Team Liquid partners with Joule to leverage esports data. This collaboration aims to unlock insights from vast amounts of data, improving team performance and strategy.

title: Haleon Chooses SAP Solutions to Accelerate Growth Through Technology
summary: Haleon selects SAP Business Suite for enhanced digital and AI capabilities. This move aims to accelerate growth through technology adoption.

title: How Würth Standardizes B2B E‑Procurement with Customers via SAP Business Network
summary: Würth standardizes B2B e-procurement with customers via SAP Business Network. This integration streamlines purchasing processes and provides real-time inventory management.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP Ariba has released its next-gen platform, leveraging AI for intelligent procurement. This update aims to transform the source-to-pay process with AI-driven capabilities.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP has announced the 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners globally. The awards highlight partners that have excelled in delivering value to customers.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary: SAP Distributed Energy Resources offers data orchestration for utilities to unlock value from distributed energy resources. This enables the energy flexibility market by providing real-time data management.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies are integrating customer experience with operational precision to streamline the lead-to-cash journey. This matters because it enables more efficient and personalized customer interactions.

title: The SAP-NHL Front Office App for iPad: Real-Time, Data-Driven Decisions On the Go
summary: SAP and the NHL launched a mobile app for iPad, providing real-time data for front office decisions. This app gives teams instant access to critical information, enhancing their ability to make informed decisions.

title: SAP Cloud ERP Private: Delivering Continuous Innovation with FPS01
summary: SAP Cloud ERP Private now integrates AI capabilities, enhancing its functionality. This update enables continuous innovation and improved performance.

title: International Women’s Day 2026: Building Trust and Equity Through Pay Transparency
summary: Organizations can now leverage pay transparency to build trust and equity. This shift from compliance to proactive action matters because it promotes fairer work environments.

title: SAP AppHaus Network: Riding the Waves of Change Together
summary: SAP AppHaus Network held its annual global meet-up, bringing together nearly all members. This event marks a continued commitment to collaboration and innovation within the network.

title: SAP Deepens SmartRecruiters Integration for AI-Driven Hiring and a More Connected HCM Suite
summary: SAP deepens integration with SmartRecruiters for AI-driven hiring. This integration creates a connected talent architecture for hiring decisions, skills intelligence, and workforce planning.

title: Why Generative UI Is the New Frontier for Business Software
summary: Generative UI technology allows software to dynamically create user interfaces based on user input and context. This innovation matters because it can revolutionize business software by providing a more personalized and adaptive user experience.
